ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., municipal, provincial, federal) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the election occurred */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the election */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the election */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "poll_number" INTEGER /* Number of the poll station */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district of the poll */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election in which the poll is held */,
  "poll_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "poll_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "poll_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Political party the candidate is affiliated with */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Previous experience of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll where the votes were cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who received the votes */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate in the poll */,
  "vote_time" TEXT /* Time when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll for which statistics are recorded */,
  "total_vote" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "total_electors" INTEGER /* Total number of registered electors */,
  "rejected_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of ballots rejected */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_statistics_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Party ideology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which results are recorded */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate in the election */,
  "winning_status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate (e.g., winner, loser) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election officer, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., election results, voter statistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., election update, system alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "data_changed" TEXT /* Type of data changed (e.g., election results, voter statistics) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the official is involved in */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., chief electoral officer, polling station manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
